name: Chocolate Mint Baked Alaska
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Combine half a cup of mint-chocolate chips and butter over hot (not boiling) water until melted and smooth.
2. Add chocolate wafer crumbs; stir until well blended.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Freeze until firm.
Filling:
1. Combine remaining mint-chocolate chips, corn syrup, and heavy cream over hot (not boiling) water until melted and smooth.
2. Cool to room temperature.
3. In a large bowl, whip softened vanilla ice cream until smooth but not melted.
